name: Mobile viewport shows a bottom nav bar and hides the sidebar
description: On a narrow mobile viewport the desktop sidebar is hidden and a fixed bottom navigation bar appears, presenting its destinations as a single horizontal row of tap targets pinned to the bottom edge.

planSteps.description: Resize the browser to a narrow mobile viewport width of about 390 pixels
Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load

Verify the left desktop sidebar is not visible at this width and instead a navigation bar is pinned to the bottom edge of the screen, containing several destination items (such as Home, Review, Feynman, Research, Room) arranged side-by-side in one horizontal row
Click the Review item in the bottom navigation bar
Verify the app navigates to the review view, confirming the bottom-nav items are working links and not just decorative icons
